title: Mob Pouches
description: Pouches to carry mobs, just like bucketed fish.
body:
Pouches use the `#wich:pouchable` tag [all non-aquatic vanilla (and some modded (see below)) mobs smaller than a block by default]. Entities in the `#wich:never_pouchable` tag [empty by default] can never be pouched regardless of the game rules set.

The `wich:allow_pouching_baby_mobs` (`allowPouchingBabyMobs` before 1.21.11) gamerule [true by default] allows baby mobs (including small slimes) to be pouched.

The `wich:allow_pouching_all_mobs` (`allowPouchingAllMobs` before 1.21.11) gamerule [false by default] allows all mobs to be pouched.

Players cannot be picked up with pouches and pouching a mob will dismount it / dismount any of its riders.

Try out the [Entity Item Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-item-tooltips) mod for detailed tooltips on the mobs in every pouch.

The [Pouchable Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/mob-pouches-pouchable-villagers) example data pack allows Villagers to be pouched explicitly.

Pouches should work on all mod mobs but will need them to be added to the `#wich:pouchable` tag or allow pouching all mobs first. The pouchable tag is already configured to support mobs from:
- [Cluckshrooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/cluckshrooms)
- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Creatures and Beasts](https://modrinth.com/mod/creatures-and-beasts)
- [Critters and Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions)
- [Duckling](https://modrinth.com/mod/duckling)
- [Enderman Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul)
- [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape)
- [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
- [Ghost](https://modrinth.com/mod/ghost)
- [Golem Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/golem-overhaul)
- [Hamsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/hamsters)
- [Jagm's Kiwis](https://modrinth.com/mod/jagms-kiwis)
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)
- [Mobs of Mythology](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobs-of-mythology)
- [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade)
- [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits)
- [Rotten Creatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/rottencreatures)
- [Snuffles](https://modrinth.com/mod/snuffles-fabric)
- [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)
- [Wilder Nature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-wildernature/gallery)
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild)
